ops.text: {"config":{"amends":"qa_proxy_rule (prereg cell 7ca6e011dd06): the failed 0.95 serve-time gate halts SERVING candidacy, not the scientific sweep","cell":"amendment","experiment":"E11-threshold-geometry","operationalizations":{"cid":"trips iff prose-stratum sentinel ROC AUC (all prose rows, score 1 - P(NO_STEER)) <= 0.60 for BOTH arms on the PRIMARY strata","decision_rule_baseline":"current = v001 at its registered production threshold (registry thresholds.budget) on its registered render: fired prose-stratum corrective count + false-fire rate over all label=False rows","decision_rule_candidate":"per arm: QA-stratum threshold pinned at the arm's registered threshold; prose-stratum threshold swept over observed probs; feasible iff overall false-fire rate <= 2x current; rule passes iff max feasible prose corrective fired count >= 2x current prose corrective fired count","matched_budget":"harness.metrics.threshold_for_budget on prose-stratum fire scores (1 - P(NO_STEER)) at the current v001 overall fires/100","per_context_roc":"the QA stratum carries ZERO label=False rows on eval-v2 under both stratifications (268/268 primary, 211/211 secondary are positives: question_answer events are steer events by construction), so QA-stratum ROC is undefined; the per-context read is prose-stratum ROC AUC plus QA fired-recall at the arm's registered threshold","stats":"exact_binomial_ci on every headline count; percentile bootstrap (seed 1729) for AUC intervals"},"primary_stratification":"sidecar: qa iff source_kind == 'question_answer' (clean offline label). The preregistered decision rule and CID are read HERE.","rationale":"The proxy gate did its job: servability of a two-threshold candidate is NOT established (0.9111 < 0.95). The scientific question \u2014 does threshold geometry buy prose corrective coverage? \u2014 is a property of the data, so it is read on clean labels; the FP-free proxy view bounds what today's render could serve.","secondary_stratification":"proxy: qa iff render-v2 ask_block marker in the final assistant turn (FP-free serve-time proxy, agreement 0.9111, fp=0, fn=57). Reported alongside the primary with per-headline deltas \u2014 the servable view.","seed":1729,"serving_requirement":"Any two-threshold SERVING candidacy additionally requires a serve-time QA detector >= 0.95, expected from STRUCTURED events (ask_blocks on the event stream, not render grepping), validated on live traffic (E13 ledger / P1). This is a plan feed, not part of E11.","v001_render":"frozen eval-v1 prompts by shared id (637/641 rows; 0 label/category mismatches, prompts differ only on ask rewriting); the 4 v2-only rows are ask-free so render v1 == v2 (asserted in code)"},"config_hash":"5d5d25af9d9e","dataset_digest":"96c5503634cf9985","experiment":"E11-threshold-geometry","metrics":{"cid_auc_ceiling":0.6,"rule_coverage_factor":2.0,"rule_false_fire_factor":2.0},"seed":1729,"verdict":"AMENDMENT (dual stratification, digest 96c5503634cf9985): PRIMARY strata for the decision rule and CID = clean sidecar QA label (source_kind == 'question_answer'); SECONDARY (servable view) = the FP-free final_assistant ask-block proxy (0.9111, fp=0, fn=57), reported alongside with per-headline deltas. Rationale: the proxy gate did its job \u2014 servability is NOT established; the scientific question (does threshold geometry buy prose corrective coverage?) is a property of the data and is read on clean labels. Serving candidacy additionally requires a structured-event serve-time detector >= 0.95 validated on live traffic (E13/P1) \u2014 a plan feed, not part of E11. Operationalized: CID trips iff prose AUC <= 0.6 for both arms on primary strata; rule baseline = v001 at its registered budget threshold; candidate pins the arm's registered threshold on QA and sweeps the prose threshold under <= 2.0x current false-fire. The QA stratum carries zero label=False rows under both stratifications (question_answer events are steer events by construction), so QA-stratum ROC is undefined; the per-context read is prose ROC AUC + QA fired-recall at the registered threshold."}
